message:
🐛 fix: resolve 3 GA4 runtime errors (deploy render, SSE iteration, clipboard fallback) (#2911)

Bug 1: DeploymentStatus and DeploymentProgress passed replicas as an
object {ready, desired} to drill-down context. If this object leaked into
React rendering it caused "Objects are not valid as React child". Fix:
pass replicas and readyReplicas as separate numeric fields, consistent
with DeploymentIssues and other cards.

Bug 2: sseClient.ts iterated cached.data without a null guard, causing
"items is not iterable" when cached.data was undefined. Fix: default to
empty array with (cached.data as T[]) || [].

Bug 3: clipboard.ts now uses typeof guard to handle browsers where
navigator.clipboard exists but writeText is not callable. analytics.ts
error handler now filters clipboard errors in the window.error listener
(was only filtered in unhandledrejection).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
